location: On a corpse in the small graveyard just west of the Church of Pilgrimage, at the northern tip of Weeping Peninsula — from the Sacred Tear body inside the church, head almost due west to the westernmost grave.

source.name: Corpse in graveyard, Church of Pilgrimage

tactics: The Church of Pilgrimage also holds a Sacred Tear (a permanent flask-boosting item) on a body inside — grab both in the same stop.
No enemies guard the graveyard itself, so this is a safe, quick early pickup.
It looks and plays almost identically to the Iron Roundshield sold by a Limgrave merchant — the main difference is its noticeably better holy damage negation.
lore: An ordinary iron roundshield dressed up with a layer of gold leaf. Most of the gilding has flaked away and its effect is faint, but it still grants a bit of extra holy damage negation.

builds.name: Holy-resistant Strength shield
builds.why: Pure Strength scaling with the best holy negation among the plain metal shields makes it a solid early pick against holy-damage clerics and undead.
